channel.title: ICP CLI Documentation
channel.description: Command-line tool for developing and deploying applications on the Internet Computer Protocol (ICP).

item.title: CLI Reference
item.description: Auto-generated reference of all icp CLI commands, subcommands, and flags with usage examples.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Configuration Reference
item.description: Complete schema reference for icp.yaml project configuration including canisters, networks, and environments.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Environments and Networks
item.description: Learn how networks and environments relate to control where and how canisters are deployed.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Local Development
item.description: Day-to-day edit-build-deploy workflow for developing and testing canisters on a local ICP network.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Using Containerized Networks
item.description: Run ICP test networks inside Docker containers for isolated, reproducible local development and CI/CD pipelines.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Project Model
item.description: How icp-cli discovers, loads, and consolidates project configuration from icp.yaml and related manifest files.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: icp-cli Documentation
item.description: Build and deploy applications on the Internet Computer using icp-cli, with links to quickstart, tutorials, guides, and reference documentation.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Quickstart
item.description: Install icp-cli and deploy a full-stack Internet Computer app to a local network in under 5 minutes.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Telemetry
item.description: Learn what anonymous usage data icp-cli collects, how to opt out, and how the telemetry system works.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Tutorial
item.description: Step-by-step walkthrough of deploying a full-stack Motoko and React app on the Internet Computer.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Canister Settings Reference
item.description: All available canister settings for resource allocation, memory limits, logging, and runtime behavior.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Environment Variables Reference
item.description: All environment variables used by icp-cli during builds, deployments, and script execution.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Reference
item.description: Complete technical specifications including CLI commands, icp.yaml configuration schema, canister settings, and environment variables.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Migrating from dfx
item.description: Transition from dfx to icp-cli with a side-by-side comparison of configuration, commands, and deployment models.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Canister Migration
item.description: Move a canister to a different subnet while optionally preserving its state and canister ID.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Canister Snapshots
item.description: Back up, transfer, and restore full canister state using snapshots.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Creating Recipes
item.description: Author custom Handlebars-based recipe templates to encode build conventions and share them across projects.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Creating Project Templates
item.description: Create custom project templates for icp new using cargo-generate to scaffold new ICP projects.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Deploying to IC Mainnet
item.description: Set up an identity, obtain cycles, and deploy canisters to the Internet Computer mainnet.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Deploying to Specific Subnets
item.description: Target specific Internet Computer subnets for geographic, replication, or colocation requirements when deploying canisters.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Guides
item.description: Step-by-step guides covering installation, local development, deployment, identity management, and more.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Installation
item.description: Install icp-cli, ic-wasm, and language toolchains on macOS, Linux, or Windows via npm, Homebrew, or shell script.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Managing Environments
item.description: Configure and use dev, staging, and production environments to deploy independent canister instances with different settings.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Managing Identities
item.description: Create, import, export, and manage cryptographic identities and principals used for canister ownership and authentication.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Tokens and Cycles
item.description: Manage ICP tokens and cycles, including conversions, balance checks, and topping up canisters.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Using Recipes
item.description: Reference official and custom recipes to simplify canister build configuration for Rust, Motoko, and frontend projects.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Binding Generation
item.description: Generate type-safe client code from Candid interface files to call canister methods with full type checking.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Build, Deploy, Sync
item.description: Understand the three phases that move canister source code to a running, configured state on the Internet Computer.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Canister Discovery
item.description: How icp-cli enables canisters to find each other through automatic canister ID injection across different environments.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Concepts
item.description: Overview of core icp-cli concepts including project model, build lifecycle, environments, recipes, and canister discovery.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation

item.title: Recipes
item.description: How recipes use Handlebars templates to generate reusable build and sync configurations, reducing canister boilerplate.
item.dc:creator: DFINITY Foundation
